Description: Drudge Charm tier line -- migrated 2026-05-04 from BetterSupportSkills DrudgeCharmTrophySettings + QuestTurnInCap.BulkQuestWcids. Drops from any CreatureType.Drudge kill (independent rolls per tier), bulk turn-in to any NPC that accepts WCID 24835 (10 vanilla Collector NPCs). No sibling replacement (drudge charms have a long history of variant WCIDs but the user wants only the Bloodletter line live). XP fractions and bank credits match the prior DrudgeCharmTrophies defaults.
